# Market Sizing: US B2C Consumer Fintech Market

## Summary
US B2C consumer fintech market sizing follows population × penetration × ARPU framing.
Viral-k factor and retention cohorts drive bottom-up SOM reasoning.

## Findings
- US adult smartphone-owner population: 240-260M (range from 2 sources, 2025) [VERIFIED:pewresearch.org|2026-04-22]
- Category penetration (target 25-44 demo): 15-25% range [ASSUMED:competitor app-store install stats]
- ARPU (consumer fintech typical): $40-80 annual [VERIFIED:statista.com|2026-04-22]
- Viral-k factor (organic referral): 0.3-0.7 typical for consumer fintech [ASSUMED:retention cohort analysis from public case studies]
- Retention at 90 days: 20-35% range [VERIFIED:data.ai|2026-04-21]
- Persona × JTBD: young professionals seeking budgeting automation drive primary segment [ASSUMED:derived from category-leader acquisition histories]

## Sources
1. [Pew Research Center mobile technology fact sheet](https://pewresearch.org/) — accessed 2026-04-22
